case_title: BUTTCHEN TERRY VS WEST COAST CREDIT SERVICES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $335.38 FILED BY BUTTCHEN TERRY AS TO DEFENDANT WEST COAST CREDIT SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
